query:
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.email, u.name, u.createdAt,
       a.membershipTier, a.membershipType, a.onboardingStep, a.onboardingCompletedAt,
       a.joiningFeePaidAt, a.jltEmail
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles a ON a.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'katholidays.uk@gmail.com';
